Metadata.title: TODEA — IT Consulting & Cloud Native Solutions
Metadata.description: We help businesses modernize their infrastructure, adopt cloud-native technologies, and build software that scales.

Hero.title: IT Consulting & Cloud Native Solutions
Hero.description: We help businesses modernize their infrastructure, adopt cloud-native technologies, and build software that scales. Fresh perspective, deep expertise.

Services.label: What We Do
Services.title: Services Built for Modern Teams
Services.subtitle: Whether you're migrating to the cloud, modernizing legacy systems, or building from scratch — we're here to help.
Services.cloudDesc: Design and execute cloud strategies that improve performance, strengthen security, reduce costs, and set your team up for long-term success.
Services.softwareDesc: Build modern, cloud-native applications tailored to your business. From microservices to full-stack products, we write clean code that ships.
Services.consultingDesc: Honest, practical advice on your technology roadmap. We help you make smart decisions about architecture, tooling, and team structure.
Services.devopsDesc: Automate your build, test, and deployment pipelines. We implement GitOps workflows and infrastructure-as-code so your team can move faster.
Services.k8sDesc: From containerizing your apps to running production-grade Kubernetes clusters, we help you embrace cloud-native infrastructure the right way.
Services.securityDesc: Bake security into your infrastructure from day one. We help you build secure systems that meet industry standards without slowing you down.

Approach.label: How We Work
Approach.title: Simple, Transparent, Effective
Approach.subtitle: No bloated proposals. No lock-in contracts. Just good engineering, clear communication, and real results.
Approach.step1Desc: We start by listening. We map your current systems, pain points, and goals before writing a single line of code or making any recommendations.
Approach.step2Desc: We design a clear roadmap and work in short cycles. You see progress every week, not after months. We ship incrementally and adapt as we learn.
Approach.step3Desc: We hand off clean, documented systems your team can actually maintain. We stick around to make sure everything runs smoothly in production.

About.label: About Us
About.missionTitle:
We build technology
that actually works.
About.missionSub: No fluff. No buzzwords. Just solid engineering.
About.title: A Small Team That Thinks Big
About.p1: We're a newly founded IT consulting and cloud-native solutions company. We started TODEA because we believe businesses deserve technology partners who are transparent, skilled, and genuinely invested in their success.
About.p2: Our team brings hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure, modern software development, and enterprise architecture. We're small by choice — it means every client gets our full attention, and every project gets senior-level expertise.
About.p3: We're not trying to be the biggest. We're trying to be the team you actually trust with your infrastructure.

TechStack.label: Tech Stack
TechStack.title: Technologies We Work With
TechStack.subtitle: We're opinionated about using the right tool for the job, and we stay current with what actually works in production.

Industries.label: Industries
Industries.title: Built for Regulated, High-Stakes Environments
Industries.subtitle: Every industry has its own compliance requirements, uptime expectations, and security standards. We've worked across sectors where getting it wrong isn't an option.
Industries.bankingDesc: Build zero-downtime platforms with FIPS 140-2 validated cryptography, real-time fraud detection pipelines, and audit-ready infrastructure that regulators trust.
Industries.techDesc: Ship faster with cloud-native CI/CD, auto-scaling Kubernetes clusters, and fully observable microservices. We handle the infra so you can focus on your product.
Industries.autoDesc: Power connected vehicle platforms, OTA update pipelines, and edge computing workloads with secure, low-latency infrastructure built for automotive reliability.
Industries.energyDesc: Modernize SCADA systems, deploy FIPS-compliant monitoring across remote sites, and build data platforms that turn raw sensor data into operational intelligence.
Industries.healthDesc: Run HIPAA-ready workloads on FIPS-validated infrastructure. From medical imaging pipelines to patient data platforms, we build systems that protect what matters.
Industries.travelDesc: Handle unpredictable traffic spikes with auto-scaling architecture, real-time inventory systems, and globally distributed services that keep booking flows fast.

CtaBanner.title: Have a Project in Mind?
CtaBanner.description: Whether it's a cloud migration, a new product build, or just a conversation about your architecture — we'd love to hear from you. No sales pitch, just a real conversation.

Contact.label: Get in Touch
Contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
Contact.subtitle: Drop us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. No commitment, no pressure.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.tellMorePlaceholder: What are you working on? What's the challenge?
Contact.thankYou: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
Contact.directDesc: We're a small team and we reply fast. Reach out however works best for you.

Footer.description: IT consulting and cloud-native solutions. Built in Seoul, serving businesses everywhere.
